Build

GameFi Development

2049 will start building a GAMEFI game platform and become a high-quality chain game platform for HK web3, which will assume the responsibility of the best-selling mobile game distribution platform for tens of millions of users. As a partner developer, get the proven tools you need to operate at scale without years of proprietary development and numerous software integrations.

Analytics

Launch

Community

We provide the game and social features that help build engaging audiences, and use our multi-channel growth features to grow the audience. Our Live Operations dashboard allows developers to manage their games 24 hours a day, using all the off the shelf features build into the platform, A/B test different configurations for optimum results, and manage customer support tickets, all from one place.

Growth / Marketing

Scale

Web 3 • Blockchain

Integrate the 2049 Wallet and allow your players to experience cutting edge blockchain features right within the game. With these features built into our games platform for iOS, Android, and Unity, you can be in-market with playable NFT 's and tokens in just a few days. Best of all, player on-boarding and compliance is entirely handled by 2049, allowing you to focus on building a great game experience!

Roadmap

Q3 2023

  • Website Launch
  • NEW Smart Contract
  • Social Marketing
  • Youtube Marketing
  • 1000 Telegram Members
  • Launch on Pancakeswap

Q4 2023

  • Listing on CoinGecko
  • Release Game Alpha version
  • 5000 Telegram Members
  • Listing on Coin Market Cap
  • CEX Listing

Q1 2024

  • Game Release
  • NFTs Marketplace Beta
  • Additional CEX Listings
  • 2049 Official Merchandise

Q2 2024

  • Release NFT Marketplace
  • Native Stacking
  • New Game Partnerships

Core Team

Meet Our Core Team.

2049 INU is founded by experienced team members with experience in developing and delivering innovative blockchain solutions.

CEO

Sam is an experienced business leader with deep expertise in driving innovation and transformation across a broad range of technical solutions. Sandeep has experience in developing blockchain applications and has been leading the team in meeting milestones.

CPO

Alex is an innovator who understands the user requirements and gaps in the market to develop user friendly products. Alex has been actively involved in the blockchain industry for 4 years with more than 7 years of backend development experience trades for over 40+ projects.

CMO

A marketing specialist with 6+ years experience in communication for global brands. Handled different domains - advertising, digital marketing, community building and branding. Working as a blockchain marketeer since last 3 years on projects ranging.

CTO

Pratheek is a technology professional with over 8 years of experience in development, delivery and management of cutting edge technologies. Experience spans over multiple technologies including Node.js, Java, AWS, Python, Mongo DB, Solidity, Golang etc.
